data.title: HUTCHMED’s Savolitinib Combo Shows Phase III Success in EGFR-Mutated Lung Cancer
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

HUTCHMED (China) ( (HK:0013) ) just unveiled an update.

HUTCHMED highlighted the publication in The Lancet of Phase III SACHI trial results, which show that combining its MET inhibitor savolitinib (ORPATHYS®) with AstraZeneca’s osimertinib (TAGRISSO®) significantly improves progression-free survival and response rates versus chemotherapy in patients with advanced EGFR-mutated non-small cell lung cancer who develop MET amplification after prior EGFR-TKI treatment. The data underpin the June 2025 regulatory approval in China for the all-oral savolitinib–osimertinib regimen, reinforcing HUTCHMED’s position in precision oncology and expanding treatment options for a difficult-to-treat subset of lung cancer patients, with a tolerable safety profile and potential to further entrench the company’s role in MET-targeted therapy alongside AstraZeneca.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0013) stock is a Hold with a HK$23.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on HUTCHMED (China) stock, see the HK:0013 Stock Forecast page.

More about HUTCHMED (China)

HUTCHMED (China) Limited is a biopharmaceutical company focused on the discovery, development and commercialization of targeted therapies, including the MET tyrosine kinase inhibitor savolitinib (marketed in China as ORPATHYS®), for patients with advanced solid tumors such as non-small cell lung cancer. It operates in partnership with AstraZeneca, which co-develops and commercializes savolitinib in China and is targeting patient populations with defined genetic drivers, including EGFR mutations and MET aberrations.

Average Trading Volume: 5,055,888

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$20.27B

data.title: Aceso Life Science Warns of Volatility as Regulators Flag Highly Concentrated Shareholding
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Aceso Life Science Group Limited ( (HK:0474) ) has shared an announcement.

Aceso Life Science Group Limited has disclosed, at the request of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange and following an enquiry by the Securities and Futures Commission (SFC), that as of 31 December 2025 its shareholding was highly concentrated in the hands of a few investors. Three substantial shareholders held 71.94% of issued shares, while 20 other shareholders and their related parties held a further 18.79%, leaving only 9.27% of shares in the hands of other investors, a structure that significantly limits the effective free float. The SFC highlighted that over the period from 10 September to 31 December 2025, Aceso’s share price surged 489%, and by 12 January 2026 was up 521% from its September level, raising concerns that such sharp moves, combined with the tight float, could lead to substantial price volatility. The company has cautioned existing shareholders and prospective investors that even small trades could trigger large price swings, underscoring elevated trading and liquidity risk and the need for extreme caution when dealing in its shares.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0474) stock is a Sell with a HK$0.12 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aceso Life Science Group Limited stock, see the HK:0474 Stock Forecast page.

More about Aceso Life Science Group Limited

Aceso Life Science Group Limited is a Hong Kong-listed company (Stock Code: 00474) incorporated in the Cayman Islands with limited liability, whose shares are traded on the Main Board of the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong. The company operates within the life sciences sector, though this announcement focuses specifically on its shareholding structure and trading characteristics rather than its underlying products or services.

Average Trading Volume: 11,135,445

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company ( (HK:0468) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Greatview Aseptic Packaging has proposed removing Grant Thornton Hong Kong as its auditor and appointing Rongcheng (Hong Kong) CPA Limited, subject to shareholder approval at an extraordinary general meeting, in order to accelerate completion of its delayed 2024 and 2025 audits and support the planned resumption of trading in its shares. The board cited Grant Thornton’s insistence on awaiting the outcome of a second-stage investigation into the deconsolidated international business, looming regulatory deadlines for publishing outstanding results, and a desire for an auditor with stronger China-focused experience as reasons for the change, signalling an effort to resolve compliance risks and align its audit process with its post-restructuring, China-centric operations.

More about Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company Limited is a Hong Kong-listed producer of aseptic packaging, serving beverage and liquid food manufacturers. Following a restructuring completed in early 2024, the group’s core operations are now primarily based in China, and its financial reporting and audit needs are increasingly focused on its China-based business activities.

data.title: ETHK Labs Overhauls Board, Committees and Company Secretary After Senior Resignations
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

IVD Medical Holding Limited ( (HK:1931) ) has shared an announcement.

ETHK Labs Inc. has announced substantial changes to its leadership and governance structure effective 13 January 2026, with the resignation of executive directors Mr. Law Kim Fai and Ms. Tai Yang, and independent non-executive director Mr. Wong Sze Lok, alongside Mr. Law stepping down as chief financial officer, company secretary and authorised representative. In response, the company has reshuffled key board committees, appointing Mr. Zhang Jianlei as chairman of both the audit and remuneration committees, adding Mr. Chan Siu Kei Ken to the nomination committee and naming him company secretary, and appointing Mr. Zhong Renqian and Mr. Xu Da to the remuneration committee. The changes leave the nomination committee temporarily without gender diversity as required under Hong Kong’s corporate governance code, and the board has indicated it will review the committee’s composition, underscoring ongoing governance obligations and the importance of maintaining regulatory compliance amid senior management turnover.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1931) stock is a Hold with a HK$2.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on IVD Medical Holding Limited stock, see the HK:1931 Stock Forecast page.

ETHK Labs Inc., incorporated in the Cayman Islands and listed in Hong Kong, is part of a group engaged in business activities that require a formal board, audit, remuneration and nomination committee structure under Hong Kong’s Listing Rules and Corporate Governance Code, indicating a regulated, exchange-listed corporate profile focused on compliance and governance standards.

data.title: Raffles Interior Faces Complaint Over Alleged PRC FX Breaches Tied to HK$300 Million Deal
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Raffles Interior Ltd. ( (HK:1376) ) has provided an update.

Raffles Interior Limited has disclosed that it received an anonymous complaint letter sent to Hong Kong regulators and the company, alleging that executive director and controlling shareholder Zheng Nenghuan and related parties may have violated PRC foreign exchange control regulations and improperly transferred domestic PRC assets overseas in connection with a proposed HK$300 million acquisition. The complaint questions the recent intra-group transfer of Shenzhen Jinxu Technology Co., Ltd., which holds land-use rights in mainland China, to the acquisition target vehicle ultimately controlled by Zheng, and highlights an apparent absence of required foreign exchange registration under PRC Circular No. 37, warning that proceeding with the deal without rectifying this could expose the company to regulatory risk in China and potentially harm minority shareholders’ interests.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1376) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.19 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Raffles Interior Ltd. stock, see the HK:1376 Stock Forecast page.

More about Raffles Interior Ltd.

Raffles Interior Limited is a Hong Kong-listed company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating in the interior solutions and related services sector, with its shares traded on the Main Board of the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong under stock code 1376. The company’s shareholder base includes a controlling shareholder and executive director, Zheng Nenghuan, reflecting a governance structure where related-party transactions and regulatory compliance are closely scrutinised by Hong Kong and PRC authorities.

data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

An announcement from COSCO SHIPPING Holdings Co ( (HK:1919) ) is now available.

COSCO SHIPPING Holdings has agreed, via its indirect non-wholly owned subsidiary COSCO Asset Management, to commission the construction of six 3,000 TEU container vessels from affiliate Heavy Industry (Zhoushan) at a total contract value of RMB1.98 billion, with delivery scheduled between June and December 2028. Classified as a connected transaction under Hong Kong Listing Rules due to common control by COSCO SHIPPING, the deal will be financed through a mix of offshore debt and/or bank loans of up to 60% of each vessel’s price and the company’s internal resources, and—when aggregated with previous related-party deals—remains subject only to reporting, annual review and announcement requirements, underscoring the group’s continued fleet expansion while highlighting ongoing governance and compliance scrutiny around connected transactions.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1919) stock is a Sell with a HK$10.40 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on COSCO SHIPPING Holdings Co stock, see the HK:1919 Stock Forecast page.

The company is controlled by COSCO SHIPPING and is listed in Hong Kong, with its fleet expansion and asset investments closely watched by investors given its role in global container trade.

data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

United Co RUSAL ( (HK:0486) ) has issued an update.

United Company RUSAL has announced the payment of interest on its BO-001P-11 series exchange-traded bonds, issued under its 001R bond programme and listed in Russia. For the sixteenth coupon period, running from 11 December 2025 to 10 January 2026, the company paid a total of RUB 154.4 million, or RUB 15.44 per bond, across 10 million bonds, with the coupon calculated based on the Bank of Russia’s key rate plus a 2.50% annual premium. The timely coupon payment underscores RUSAL’s continued access to domestic debt markets and its use of variable-rate bonds to align funding costs with Russian monetary conditions, which is relevant for bondholders monitoring the company’s credit profile and liquidity management.

More about United Co RUSAL

United Company RUSAL is an international public joint-stock company and one of the world’s largest aluminium producers, with its securities listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, Moscow Exchange and SPB Exchange. data.title: TransThera Sciences to Raise HK$190 Million via Discounted H-Share Placement
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

TransThera Sciences (Nanjing). Inc. ( (HK:2617) ) has shared an update.

TransThera Sciences (Nanjing), Inc. has entered into a placing agreement with a sole placing agent to issue 2.1 million new H shares at HK$92.85 per share, representing about 0.7% of its existing H share capital and 0.53% of total issued shares. The placing price reflects a discount of around 18% to recent market prices and is expected to raise gross proceeds of approximately HK$194.99 million (net HK$190.14 million), with the new shares issued under the company’s existing general mandate and requiring no additional shareholder approval. The shares will be placed with at least six independent professional or institutional investors, none of whom is expected to become a substantial shareholder, and the company will seek listing approval for the new shares on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, although completion remains subject to conditions and may not proceed, signaling both a move to strengthen its capital base and potential dilution for existing shareholders.

More about TransThera Sciences (Nanjing). Inc.

TransThera Sciences (Nanjing), Inc. is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China with limited liability and listed in Hong Kong, where it trades H shares under stock code 2617. data.title: Yancoal Sets Date for 4Q 2025 Report and Investor Webcast
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Yancoal Australia ( (AU:YAL) ).

Yancoal Australia has announced it will release its fourth-quarter 2025 quarterly report on 19 January 2026 after 7:30pm AEDT, providing the market with an update on its recent operational and financial performance. The company will follow the release with a webcast for investors and analysts on 20 January 2026, signalling continued engagement with the investment community and offering stakeholders an opportunity to gain further insight and ask questions about Yancoal’s latest results and outlook.

More about Yancoal Australia

Yancoal Australia Ltd is a major Australian coal producer listed on both the Australian Securities Exchange and the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, with operations focused on thermal and metallurgical coal for domestic and export markets. Headquartered in Sydney, the company targets power generation and steelmaking customers, primarily in Asia, and is overseen by a board comprising executive, non-executive and independent non-executive directors.
